title: AI-Powered Summarization: Extracting Key  Insights from Text, Video, and PDFs Using  spaCy
author: Sathyan, Vikhnesh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this paper we investigate the extractive summarization with spaCy for summarizing YouTube transcript,  plain text and PDFs. It includes steps of text preprocessing, tokenization, named entity recognition (NER) and dependency  parsing to pull in relevant data. The method we developed to extract those sentences helps keeping coherence and sense, but cut all off-topic parts. Summary is generated in an effective way for decent reading and accuracy by the system.
steps_raw: In this paper we investigate the extractive summarization with spaCy for summarizing YouTube transcript,  plain text and PDFs. It includes steps of text preprocessing, tokenization, named entity recognition (NER) and dependency  parsing to pull in relevant data. The method we developed to extract those sentences helps keeping coherence and sense, but cut all off-topic parts. Summary is generated in an effective way for decent reading and accuracy by the system.
keywords: Extractive Summarization, spaCy, Text Summarization, YouTube Transcripts, Natural Language Processing, Text Preprocessing, Tokenization, Named Entity Recognition, Dependency Parsing, PDF Summarization, Coherence, NLP Pipeline, Automatic Summarization, Information Extraction
